hero.title: TalonHire
hero.tagline: AI-powered recruitment that captures the perfect talent with surgical precision.
hero.subtitle: Connect LATAM tech talent with European & US companies.

01.title: Create Profile
01.desc: Upload your CV or paste your LinkedIn URL. Our AI extracts your skills, experience, and tech stack automatically.

02.title: AI Matching
02.desc: Multi-LLM scoring engine (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) evaluates technical fit, cultural alignment, and seniority.

03.title: Get Hired
03.desc: Receive match notifications, record video interviews, and get hired. 40-60% cost savings for companies.

auth.consent: I authorize TalonHire to store and process my personal data for recruitment purposes for up to 90 days, in compliance with LGPD and GDPR regulations. I can request deletion at any time.
auth.signInToAccount: Sign in to your TalonHire account

dashboard.profileActive: Your profile is active and visible to companies.
dashboard.completeProfile: Complete your profile to start receiving matches.
dashboard.noMatches: No matches yet. Complete your profile and upload your CV to start receiving AI-powered matches.
dashboard.updateAiHint: Update your AI profile so you appear in job matches.
dashboard.aiUpdated: AI profile updated. You will appear in more matches.
dashboard.addCvFirst: Add CV text first (e.g. paste or extract from PDF).
dashboard.noJobs: No jobs posted yet. Create your first job to start receiving AI-matched candidates.

job.createHint: Create a job to receive AI-matched candidates.
job.published: Job published. AI matching has been run.
job.runMatchingAfter: Run AI matching after creating job

share.title: TalonHire Match
share.rejected: This candidate has been marked as rejected. Thank you for your feedback.
share.rejectHint: Optional: add a reason (used to improve future matches).
share.videoHint: Video and transcript can be shown here when available. For now, use the company dashboard to view full match details.
